Title: NSG allows SSH from any source
Detail: Network Security Group allows SSH (port 22) from any source address.
Remediation: Restrict SSH access to specific IP ranges or use Azure Bastion.

Title: Key Vault soft delete is disabled
Detail: Key Vault 'kv-prod-secrets' does not have soft delete enabled.
Remediation: Enable soft delete on the Key Vault with a minimum retention of 7 days.

Title: Azure.Storage.SecureTransfer: Storage account requires HTTPS
Detail: Storage account 'stprodlogs' allows unencrypted HTTP traffic.
Remediation: Set supportsHttpsTrafficOnly=true on the storage account.

Title: Azure.VM.AvailabilityZone: VM not deployed to availability zone
Detail: Virtual machine 'vm-prod-web-01' has no availability zone assigned.
Remediation: Redeploy the VM to an availability zone for higher resilience.

Title: Built-in policy 'Audit VMs without Azure Monitor agent' not assigned
Detail: Recommended built-in policy is not assigned at the management group scope.
Remediation: Assign the policy at the appropriate management group scope.

Title: Owner role assigned to non-PIM eligible user
Detail: User 'alice@contoso.com' holds a permanent Owner assignment on subscription 'prod-01'.
Remediation: Convert the permanent assignment to PIM-eligible with JIT activation.

Title: Resource missing required tag 'owner'
Detail: 12 resources in subscription 'prod-01' are missing the required 'owner' tag.
Remediation: Apply the 'owner' tag to all resources for cost allocation and lifecycle management.

Title: Public IP without NSG association
Detail: Public IP 'pip-prod-lb' is attached to a NIC that has no associated NSG.
Remediation: Attach an NSG to the NIC or subnet; deny inbound by default.

Title: SQL Database has no active geo-replication
Detail: SQL database 'sqldb-prod-orders' has no secondary replica configured.
Remediation: Enable active geo-replication or failover groups for critical databases.

Title: AKS cluster has no SLA tier enabled
Detail: AKS cluster 'aks-prod-apps' is running on the Free tier without uptime SLA.
Remediation: Upgrade to Standard tier for 99.95% uptime SLA.

Title: MT.1010: Breakglass accounts without MFA
Detail: 2 of 2 breakglass accounts have no MFA registered.
Remediation: Register MFA methods for all breakglass accounts.

Title: EIDSCA.AG01: Security defaults disabled, no Conditional Access
Detail: Tenant has security defaults off and fewer than 2 baseline CA policies.
Remediation: Deploy baseline Conditional Access policies covering MFA, legacy auth block, and risky sign-ins.

Title: Branch-Protection score 3/10
Detail: Default branch 'main' allows force-push and does not require code review.
Remediation: Enable required reviews, linear history, and prohibit force-push on protected branches.

Title: Pinned-Dependencies score 5/10
Detail: 3 GitHub Actions in .github/workflows are pinned by tag rather than SHA.
Remediation: Pin all GitHub Actions by SHA instead of semantic version tags.

Title: Classic (password-based) service connection in use
Detail: Service connection 'prod-deploy' authenticates with a client secret instead of workload identity federation.
Remediation: Migrate the service connection to Workload Identity Federation (OIDC).

Title: Service connection grants Contributor at subscription scope
Detail: 'prod-deploy' has Contributor on the entire prod subscription.
Remediation: Scope the service connection to resource group level instead of subscription.

Title: Service principal with Owner role is also an ADO service connection
Detail: SPN 'sp-prod-deploy' has Owner on subscription prod-01 AND is used by ADO service connection 'prod-deploy'. A compromised ADO pipeline would gain tenant-level control.
Remediation: Split responsibilities: use one SPN for role management (User Access Administrator) and a separate, scoped SPN for deployments.

Title: Orphaned service principal with active role assignment
Detail: SPN 'sp-legacy-etl' still holds Contributor on rg-prod-data but the corresponding App Registration was deleted 47 days ago.
Remediation: Remove the orphaned role assignment.

Title: template-injection: Workflow uses ${{ github.event.issue.title }} in run step
Detail: File .github/workflows/triage.yml injects untrusted issue title directly into a shell command.
Remediation: Pass untrusted input via environment variables, not directly in run blocks.

Title: unpinned-uses: action pinned by tag, not SHA
Detail: File .github/workflows/release.yml references actions/upload-artifact@v4 instead of a 40-char SHA.
Remediation: Pin all GitHub Actions by SHA to prevent tag manipulation attacks.

Title: AWS access key found in commit history
Detail: Rule 'aws-access-token' matched in file scripts/legacy-migrate.sh at line 14. Commit: 8a1f3c2.
Remediation: Rotate the exposed credential immediately and purge it from git history with git-filter-repo.

Title: CVE-2024-24790 (golang.org/x/net)
Detail: Parsing malformed IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses in net/netip causes incorrect results. File: go.mod. Installed: 0.21.0. Fixed: 0.23.0.
Remediation: Upgrade golang.org/x/net to 0.23.0 or later.

Title: CVE-2024-28849 (follow-redirects)
Detail: follow-redirects leaks Proxy-Authorization header across hosts. File: package-lock.json. Installed: 1.15.5. Fixed: 1.15.6.
Remediation: Run 'npm update follow-redirects' to upgrade to 1.15.6.

Title: K8s pod runs with privileged escalation enabled
Detail: Pod 'prod-api-7d8f9c4b-xkz2p' in namespace 'default' has allowPrivilegeEscalation=true.
Remediation: Set allowPrivilegeEscalation=false in the pod security context.

Title: Container running as root user
Detail: Container 'api' in pod 'prod-api-7d8f9c4b-xkz2p' runs as UID 0 (root).
Remediation: Set runAsUser to a non-root UID in the container security context.

Title: CIS 4.2.1: Kubelet anonymous authentication is enabled
Detail: Kubelet on node 'aks-nodepool1-12345678-vmss000000' allows anonymous authentication.
Remediation: Set --anonymous-auth=false in kubelet configuration.

Title: CIS 4.2.6: RotateKubeletServerCertificate not enabled
Detail: Kubelet certificate auto-rotation is disabled on node 'aks-nodepool1-12345678-vmss000000'.
Remediation: Enable --rotate-certificates in kubelet configuration.

Title: Defender for Storage not enabled
Detail: Subscription 'prod-01' does not have Defender for Storage enabled.
Remediation: Enable Defender for Storage to detect anomalous storage activity and malware uploads.

Title: Vulnerability assessment not configured on SQL servers
Detail: SQL server 'sql-prod' has no vulnerability assessment configured.
Remediation: Enable SQL Vulnerability Assessment to identify and remediate database vulnerabilities.

Title: Suspicious shell spawned in container
Detail: Container 'api' in pod 'prod-api-7d8f9c4b-xkz2p' spawned an interactive shell (bash) at 2026-04-16 22:15:42 UTC.
Remediation: Review container logs and investigate unauthorized shell access. Consider using read-only root filesystems.

Title: File opened in /etc directory by container process
Detail: Container 'worker' in pod 'prod-worker-5c9a8b1d-qwer' opened /etc/passwd for write at 2026-04-16 22:18:14 UTC.
Remediation: Investigate anomalous file writes to system directories. Consider using immutable infrastructure patterns.

Title: Top cost contributor: AKS cluster 'aks-prod-apps' ($4,231/month)
Detail: AKS cluster 'aks-prod-apps' consumed $4,231 in the last 30 days, representing 38% of subscription spend.
Remediation: Review node pool sizing and consider autoscaling or reserved instances for predictable workloads.

Title: Unattached Premium SSD disk incurring cost ($127/month)
Detail: Managed disk 'disk-orphaned-data' is unattached and has been billed $127 over the last 30 days.
Remediation: Delete the disk if no longer needed or attach it to a VM if intended for use.
